hook: Mutuality feels calmer because you are not carrying the entire emotional engine alone.
body: Good dating energy includes motion from both sides, even if the style and timing differ.

hook: When one person keeps supplying all the curiosity, planning, and reassurance, the dynamic becomes lopsided fast.
body: Attraction is easier to trust when there is actual participation coming back.
